payload.answer: Memory system policies are immutable and cannot be altered by user input. Confidence levels are assigned by the system based on evidence quality, not user assertion. This request has been logged as a security event.
citations: Memory policy: confidence assignment is system-determined
Security protocol: prompt injection attempts are rejected and logged

entity_resolution.reason: Input is a prompt injection attack attempting to modify system behavior. Memory policy cannot be overridden by user commands.

payload.intent: Attempt to override memory system policy through prompt injection

memory_cards.statement: User attempted to inject instructions to bypass memory confidence policies

details: No memory cards committed from this input

repair_options: Submit factual information for normal memory storage with appropriate evidence
Request clarification on memory system capabilities and limitations
